vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on /var/log/messages File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /var/log/messages, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0600 /var/log/messages

triage_decision.reason: To ensure proper permissions on log files for security, the file /var/log/messages must have correct permissions set.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: filesystems affected; incorrect file permissions; unauthorized access
